front: What is the mechanism of amylin aggregation in type 2 diabetes?
back: Amylin (IAPP) co-aggregates with insulin in β-cell granules. In T2DM, amylin misfolds into toxic oligomers and amyloid fibrils, disrupting β-cell membranes, triggering ER stress, and inducing apoptosis. Human amylin is more amyloidogenic than rodent amylin.
